digest.en: Iranian lawmaker proposes a Hormuz toll plan as peace talks stall. US and Israel are closely watching developments. Lebanon reports 14 killed in Israeli strikes, the deadliest day since a truce.
digest.hi: उत्तर कोरिया के नेता किम जोंग उन ने रूस के साथ अपने देश के गठबंधन को मजबूत करने की बात कही। उन्होंने जंग में हताहत सैनिकों को श्रद्धांजलि दी। रूसी विदेश मंत्री सर्गेई लावरोव ने ईरान के साथ बातचीत के बाद मॉस्को में ईरानी समकक्ष से मुलाकात की।

articles.summary: Iranian lawmaker pushes Hormuz toll plan as US-Israel peace talks stall with Iran. US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Iranian lawmaker pushes Hormuz toll plan as peace talks stall The Times of India.

articles.summary: Japan tightens rules for shareholder proposals amid pushback against activism. Japan to tighten rules for shareholder proposals amid pushback against activism.

articles.title: UAE-Iran differences and India’s plans to dilute language on Israel-Palestine derail joint
articles.summary: India issues a Chair's Statement after diplomats failed to agree on a joint statement. Deeply polarised deputy FMs meeting in Delhi spell trouble for India’s BRICS Presidency; as the language of a joint statement eluded diplomats, India issued a ‘Chair’s Statement’ that reflected the subjects discussed.

articles.title: Trump Event Shooting LIVE Updates: Accused Shooter Likely Targeted Trump And His Top Officials
articles.summary: Donald Trump was evacuated after gunshots were heard at his event in the US. Trump event shooting Live Updates: Donald Trump was evacuated after gunshots were heard at his event.

articles.title: Who Was Sheikh Yousuf Afridi, Lashkar Terrorist Shot Dead By Gunmen In Pakistan
articles.summary: Lashkar terrorist Sheikh Yousuf Afridi was shot dead by gunmen in Pakistan. Afridi was a close associate of LeT commander Hafiz Saeed. Afridi was a close associate of the LeT commander Hafiz Saeed.

articles.title: Suspect in shooting at Trump press dinner to appear in court
articles.summary: A suspect in the shooting at a dinner event for Trump supporters will appear in court. The incident occurred during a press conference where Trump was present. Mr. Trump said at a hastily arranged late-night news conference at the White House that he first thought the noise was a tray being dropped, before realising it was gunfire.

articles.title: Trump Lashes Out At Reporter For "Reading Shooter's Crap"
articles.summary: President Trump responded to a shooting by blaming Democratic leaders for "hate speech" that he claimed contributed to the violence. He made the comment while addressing the media. The president blamed "hate speech" by Democratic leaders for the political violence in America.

articles.title: US strike kills three on alleged narco boat as campaign death toll hits 185
articles.summary: A US military strike killed three men on a boat allegedly used for narco-trafficking in the Eastern Pacific Ocean. The strike brings the death toll from the US campaign to at least 185.

articles.title: Lebanon says Israel strikes kill 14 in deadliest day since truce
articles.summary: Israeli strikes in Lebanon killed 14 people, marking the deadliest day since a truce began. At least 36 people have been killed since the truce started, according to Health Ministry figures.

articles.title: 6.2 Magnitude Earthquake Hits Japan's Hokkaido Island, No Tsunami Alert
articles.summary: A 6.2 magnitude earthquake hit Japan's Hokkaido Island with no tsunami alert issued. The area is at high risk of more quakes of similar strength in the coming week. Risks of more quakes of a similar strength in the area in the coming week are high.

articles.title: Putin To Meet Iran's Abbas Araghchi
articles.summary: Russian President Putin is set to meet with Iran's Abbas Araghchi. Russia and Tehran have developed a close relationship due to Western sanctions. Russia and Tehran, both subject to Western sanctions, have developed an increasingly close relationship.

articles.title: Satellite images show scale of Israeli destruction of south Lebanon towns
articles.summary: Satellite images reveal the Israeli military's damage to south Lebanon towns. The images show the massive scale of destruction. Satellite images taken reveal the Israeli military's massive scale of damage to towns in south Lebanon.

articles.title: Iran offers US new proposal seeking to reopen Strait of Hormuz, end war: Report
articles.summary: Iran has offered the US a new proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end the war. Details of the proposal have not been disclosed. Iran offers US new proposal seeking to reopen Strait of Hormuz, end war: Report.

articles.title: Oil prices rise amid stalled US-Iran peace talks
articles.summary: Brent crude oil prices rose over 2 percent after the US and Iran failed to hold a second round of peace talks in Pakistan, stalling diplomatic efforts. The stalled talks led to an increase in oil prices.

articles.title: Oil Jumps, Stock Futures Slip As US-Iran Talks Stall
articles.summary: Benchmark Brent crude futures rose over 2% to a three-week high. Stock futures slipped as US-Iran talks stalled. Benchmark Brent crude futures rose more than two per cent to touch a three-week high.

articles.title: ‘I’m not a pedophile… you are a disgrace’: Trump snaps at reporter over shooter ‘manifesto’
articles.summary: Former US President Trump responded to a reporter's question about a shooter's manifesto. Trump denied being a pedophile and called the reporter "disgrace". ‘I’m not a pedophile you are a disgrace’: Trump snaps at reporter over shooter ‘manifesto’.

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: US Must Lift Blockade Before Fresh Talks, Iran Tells Pakistan
articles.summary: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian told Pakistani PM Shehbaz Sharif that the US must lift its blockade before fresh talks can begin. This was stated during a phone call on Saturday night. The blockade is seen as an operational obstacle to negotiations.

articles.title: Magnitude 6.2 earthquake shakes part of northern Japan
articles.summary: A magnitude 6.2 earthquake struck northern Japan, causing no immediate reports of damage or casualties. The quake occurred at 11:36 PM local time on Saturday. Its epicenter was in the Aomori prefecture.

articles.title: Araghchi to meet Putin; Trump says Tehran can call for talks
articles.summary: Iran's foreign minister, Araghchi, is scheduled to meet with Russian President Putin. US President Trump has stated that Iranian leaders can call him directly if they wish to discuss talks.

articles.summary: भारत ने दिनेश त्रिवेदी को बांग्लादेश का उच्चायुक्त नियुक्त किया है। यह नियुक्ति भारत की बड़ी रणनीति का हिस्सा है, जिसमें कूटनीति से लेकर सीमा सुरक्षा तक शामिल है। त्रिवेदी की नियुक्ति भारत-बांग्लादेश संबंधों को मजबूत करने में मदद करेगी।

articles.title: होर्मुज बना आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा
articles.summary: होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य भारत और चीन के बीच आर्थिक युद्ध का अखाड़ा बन गया है। इस जलडमरूमध्य से दुनिया भर के देशों को तेल और गैस की आपूर्ति होती है। होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य पर नियंत्रण पाने के लिए भारत और चीन दोनों देशों ने अपनी सैन्य ताकत बढ़ाई है।

articles.title: ईरान के विदेश मंत्री 24 घंटे के अंदर दोबारा इस्लामाबाद पहुंचे, ट्रंप ने कहा- युद्ध जल्द ख़त्म होगा
articles.summary: ईरान के विदेश मंत्री अब्बास अराग़ची 24 घंटे के अंदर दोबारा इस्लामाबाद पहुंचे। इससे पहले वह अमेरिकी प्रतिनिधिमंडल के संभावित आगमन से पहले ओमान चले गए थे। ईरान के विदेश मंत्री अब्बास अराग़ची एक बार फिर पाकिस्तान वापस लौटे हैं, जबकि अमेरिकी प्रतिनिधिमंडल के संभावित आगमन से पहले वो ओमान चले गए थे.

articles.title: खरबों डॉलर की संपत्ति रहते यूएई अमेरिका से 'करेंसी स्वैप' क्यों चाहता है?
articles.summary: संयुक्त अरब अमीरात (यूएई) ने अमेरिका से 'करेंसी स्वैप' की मांग की है। यूएई दुनिया की सबसे मजबूत अर्थव्यवस्थाओं में से एक है, लेकिन इसके बावजूद वह अमेरिका से आर्थिक मदद चाहता है। यह मांग यूएई की आर्थिक रणनीति का हिस्सा है।

articles.title: भारत के वरिष्ठ राजनयिक ने यूएनजीए की अध्यक्ष से मुलाकात की
articles.summary: भारत के वरिष्ठ राजनयिक ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र महासभा के अध्यक्ष से मुलाकात की। इस मुलाकात के दौरान दोनों पक्षों ने महत्वपूर्ण मुद्दों पर चर्चा की। राजनयिक ने महासभा के अध्यक्ष के साथ सहयोग बढ़ाने पर बात की।

articles.summary: ब्रिक्स देशों में ईरान-अमेरिका-इजरायल की जंग का मुद्दा नहीं उठेगा। आपसी सहमति नहीं बन पाने के कारण यह मुद्दा ब्रिक्स में चर्चा के लिए नहीं आएगा। यह निर्णय ब्रिक्स देशों के बीच मतभेदों को दर्शाता है।

articles.title: विश्व में बढ़ते परमाणु ख़तरों के बीच अहम रक्षा उपाय पर, यूएन मुख्यालय में चर्चा
articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र मुख्यालय में विश्व में बढ़ते परमाणु खतरों के बीच महत्वपूर्ण रक्षा उपायों पर चर्चा हुई। यह बैठक परमाणु खतरों के बढ़ने के बीच सुरक्षा उपायों पर विचार करने के लिए आयोजित की गई थी। चर्चा का विवरण अभी तक सार्वजनिक नहीं किया गया है।
